unresolved_issues: The paper body refers detailed CEE/SW production, price, wage, and capital-producer equations to the online appendix.
No NK_DEFK17 appendix normalization file exists in docs/mmb_appendix_full_normalizations.
Detailed recursive price/wage/capital-producer equations are cross-checked against the local .mod only and marked needs_review.
Runtime validation and Dynare checks were intentionally not run.
